# azure-functions-knowledge-python

> Knowledge retrieval (RAG) decorators for Azure Functions Python v2.

## Package Info

- PyPI: `pip install azure-functions-knowledge-python`
- Version: 0.0.1
- Python: >=3.10, <3.15
- License: MIT
- Docs: https://yeongseon.github.io/azure-functions-knowledge-python/
- Repository: https://github.com/yeongseon/azure-functions-knowledge-python

## What It Does

Decorator-based knowledge retrieval bindings for Azure Functions v2. Inject search
results or provider clients into handler parameters. Built-in Notion support with
pluggable provider protocol.

## Core API

- `KnowledgeBindings` — Main class providing decorator methods
- `KnowledgeBindings.input(arg_name, provider, query, top, connection)` — Inject search results
- `KnowledgeBindings.inject_client(arg_name, provider, connection)` — Inject provider instance
- `Document` — Dataclass for retrieved knowledge documents
- `KnowledgeProvider` — Protocol that all providers must satisfy
- `register_provider(name, provider_cls)` — Register a custom provider
- `create_provider(name, connection)` — Create a provider by registered name
- `resolve_connection(value)` — Resolve `%VAR%` placeholders in connection strings

## Key Concepts

- Azure decorators outermost, knowledge decorators closest to the function
- `input` and `inject_client` are mutually exclusive on the same handler
- Connection strings support `%VAR%` environment variable substitution
- Async handlers get automatic `asyncio.to_thread` offloading
